since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.01%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC +2.64% · Gold -0.17% · Nasdaq100 -0.30%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.01%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.01%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.20%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.20%, DELL +5.06%, MU +4.67%, VRT +4.54%, DLR +4.26%. Laggards: SPCX -8.93%, AVAV -8.59%, GOOGL -7.07%, ARM -6.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.93% at $168.48
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
